introduce/quick_start/index.po.PCBA AOI 软件是一款面向电子制造的智能光学检测系统。 系统以视觉 AI: The PCBA AOI software is an Automated Optical Inspection system for electronics manufacturing. Centered on vision AI, it covers the full workflow from auto-programming and parameter generation to defect detection and continuous improvement. Unlike conventional approaches that need frequent manual tuning, the system adapts quickly to the production floor and lifts efficiency without sacrificing accuracy or stability. Backed by adaptive algorithms and a feedback loop, it catches both common and subtle defects and keeps learning during production — raising yield and reducing maintenance cost.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.本章节演示如何使用 AOI 系统快速完成一块 PCB 的建模、检测与反馈流程。: This chapter walks through programming a PCB, running an inspection, and submitting feedback end-to-end using the AOI system.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.首次进入可以使用 **管理员** 账号登录：用户名 **admin**，密码在部: On first use, log in with the **administrator** account — username **admin**; the password is provided at deployment time.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.**2. 将 PCB 放置在传送带上**: **2. Place the PCB on the Conveyor**
introduce/quick_start/index.po.选择对应传送带并点击 **锁定传送带**，确认或输入传送带宽度后点击 **进板*: Pick the conveyor and click **Lock Conveyor**, confirm or enter the conveyor width, then click **PCB In**. The PCB is fed automatically into the capture / alignment area under the camera. Once it's in position, click **Next**.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.若已知 PCB 尺寸，直接输入其宽度与高度（单位：mm）。若尺寸不确定，可移动相: If you know the PCB dimensions, type the width and height directly (in mm). If not, move the camera to capture the bottom-left and top-right corners of the PCB, click those two positions on the image in turn, and choose **Auto-calculate**; the system infers the dimensions.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.点击拍摄，系统将联动相机与传送带分区采集并自动拼接生成完整 PCB 图像；随后框: Click **Capture**; the system coordinates the camera and conveyor to acquire the board in tiles and stitch them into a full PCB image. Then box the effective area used for Auto-Programming (usually the entire board; shrink it slightly to exclude any fixture / jig edges). This reference image is the baseline for subsequent Auto-Programming, alignment, and inspection, so it must be captured from a clean, defect-free **Golden board**. Camera parameters — **Exposure**, **Gain**, **gamma** — can be tuned live on this screen; if the result is poor, re-capture to overwrite the previous version.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.提供 CAD（``.csv``）文件后，系统可自动读取封装(Package)、丝: Providing a CAD file (``.csv``) lets the system read Package, silkscreen / designator, Part Number (PN), X / Y coordinates, and rotation angle automatically; cluster components by package or part number so identical components are modeled once and training is faster; and cut down on later manual grouping and naming work.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.上传 ``.csv`` 文件后点击 **预览表格**，在字段映射界面依次指定：料: Upload the ``.csv`` file and click **Preview Table**. In the field-mapping screen, assign — in order — Part Number (PN), Package, X, Y, Rotation (°), and (optionally) the layer / side field. Pick the coordinate unit (mm or mil), confirm the origin and orientation match the captured image, then click **Run Auto-Programming**. If the CAD doesn't overlap the captured image correctly, use the alignment screen to rotate / translate / scale until it does, then re-run.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.若不提供 CAD，后续自动编程仍可执行；检测质量不受影响，仅失去基于封装/料号的: Without CAD, Auto-Programming still runs; inspection quality is unaffected — you only lose the package / part-number clustering acceleration, and the system models each component one by one. Auto-Programming takes about 30 seconds.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.自动编程完成后，会进入 **产品编程页面**。顶部提供多个标签页：: When Auto-Programming finishes, the **Product Programming page** opens. Several tabs sit at the top:
introduce/quick_start/index.po.点击 **+ 标记**，在 PCB 上 **对角位置** 分别框选 2 个固定的: Click **+ Mark** and box **two** stable reference marks on the PCB at **opposite corners** (circles, rectangles, and complex silkscreen patterns all work). Box a region slightly larger than the mark itself so it still resolves under a small board shift. The current release supports **up to 2 Mark Points**. For A/B-side mixed-product inspection, also click **+ Unique Marker** to box a clearly-distinct area on each product so the system can tell A from B automatically.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.左侧显示自动编程获得的元件列表（可在 元件 / 料号 之间切换）。若上传了 CA: The left panel lists the components Auto-Programming produced (switch between **Component** and **Part Number** views). When CAD was uploaded, the system shows the silkscreen / designator and groups identical components automatically. Filter problematic items via the search bar; for components flagged incorrectly, delete them and re-program by hand.
introduce/quick_start/index.po.评估完成后，元件会以颜色标记（绿：健康；红：不健康）。可按需查看不健康项并参考: When evaluation finishes, each component is color-coded — green for healthy, red for unhealthy. Browse the unhealthy ones and fine-tune them per :ref:`检测参数`.
